name: Excavation of the pit (котлован) with geodetic set-out
description: Разработка котлована с геодезической разбивкой. The contractor claims a dug volume; the surveyor's as-built geodetic survey (исполнительная съёмка котлована) is the trusted reference, the geotech report confirms the design soil was reached at the котлован bottom (−9.0 m). Technical supervision accepts on the SURVEYED volume; money is КС-2/КС-3 at the excavation rate. Site scope (zone=SITE).

evidence.description: Исполнительная геодезическая съёмка котлована (обмер объёма выемки) — surveyed reference for the excavated volume and the achieved bottom elevation. Drives payment.
Акт геодезической разбивочной основы / выноса осей в натуру — site axes and pit outline transferred to the ground from the design.
Акт освидетельствования грунтов основания / отчёт по геологии — confirms the design bearing soil at pit bottom.
Общий журнал работ — daily works log for the earthworks.

checks.description: Set-out act, as-built survey and bearing-soil acceptance are all attached.
Claimed excavated volume vs the as-built survey within 5% / 2 m³ (whichever greater) and within the survey's uncertainty U. Error normalized by the survey (VIM §2.16).

consequences.description: КС-3 on the surveyed pit volume, less 5% retention.
Pit bottom accepted, the raft may start.
